label: 第95話
source_locator: 単行本11巻 目次 p.131
summary_short: 猪野はオガミ婆と孫を相手に降霊術で戦い、虎杖と伏黒は粟坂二良に苦戦する。呪詛師側はそれぞれの術式で帳の基点を守る。
summary_full: 猪野は七海から一級推薦を受けることにこだわる自分の姿勢を思い返し、覆面を着けて来訪瑞獣を発動する。獬豸の追尾攻撃と霊亀の防御でオガミ婆と孫を攻めるが、孫が肉体を盾にして婆を守る。オガミ婆は降霊術の準備を進める。一方、虎杖と伏黒は粟坂へ連続攻撃を当てるものの、強い攻撃ほど軽く受け流され、弱い攻撃が効くような不自然さに気付く。粟坂の術式「あべこべ」の条件を見抜かなければ、決定打を与えられない。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 猪野 does his best to make 七海 proud against the curse users on 渋谷 Tower . Meanwhile, 悠仁 and 恵 have more trouble than expected dealing with old man 粟坂二良 . The jujutsu sorcerers want to get the fighting over quickly, but the curse users have a few tricks of their own.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: オガミ's grandson protects her from 猪野's cursed techniques. While eating dinner with him at a self-serve-style restaurant, 七海 told 猪野 his innate technique could make him a semi-grade 1 in no time. However, 猪野 has always been insistent that 七海 be the one to recommend him for the promotion. Doing things the right way is important to 猪野, especially while doing hard and undesirable work like being a jujutsu sorcerer. 猪野 doesn't consider himself to be the smartest person around, and there is a lot of gray area in their profession. Whenever 猪野 can't decide what to do he asks himself " what would 七海 do? ". With this being the case, becoming a grade 1 sorcerer without 七海's approval simply wouldn't be right for 猪野. 粟坂 left unharmed despite 悠仁 and 恵's attacks. On top of 渋谷 Tower, 呪力 flows from 猪野's body as he activates his innate technique: 来訪瑞獣 . 猪野 possesses a séance 術式 that allows him to become a spiritual medium by hiding his face. In doing so, he can summon and use the abilities of four auspicious beasts: 獬豸, 霊亀, 麒麟, and 龍. First 猪野 summons 獬豸 and shoots a horn-like projectile with homing missile capabilities. オガミ's grandson grabs her and puts his body on the line to protect her. While he shields her from harm, オガミ folds her hands in prayer with her beads and starts an incantation. 猪野 wants to wrap this fight up quickly and get back to the first-years because 七海 entrusted him with looking after them. He tells himself to understand the facts and control the self in order to eliminate one's ego. Once in the proper frame of mind, 猪野 summons the powers of 霊亀 and continues to fight. " This is the best ever. " Meanwhile, 悠仁 and 恵 fight alongside 玉犬: 渾 against 粟坂. The boys don't find fighting the enemy difficult, but working together to be the hard part of this battle. They appear to be overwhelming the old man but he remains unscathed despite all their efforts. He slices 悠仁 with a knife that only cuts the skin and gets caught in 恵's 蝦蟇 's tongue. 蝦蟇 flings the 呪詛師 into a bridge structure above them before dispelling. However, 粟坂 still isn't hurt despite 悠仁 hitting him at full strength and 玉犬's claws being capable of injuring a special grade curse. They weren't supposed to be wasting time and 恵 points this out, but 悠仁 has no comment. Back on top of 渋谷 Tower, the grandson stands in between the sorcerer and オガミ. The old woman continues her incantation while 猪野 repeatedly wins the close combat exchanges with her grandson using 霊亀's abilities. He's no match for a sorcerer, giving 猪野 a bad feeling about the situation. The jujutsu high sorcerer realizes too late and オガミ's 呪力 suddenly surges. Her conditions have been met and her grandson swallows some kind of pill. 猪野 summons 獬豸 again but the grandson's body is fast enough to catch the horn with his bare hands. オガミ revives 禪院甚爾 using her grandson's body, shocking 猪野. As his face shifts to that of 甚爾's, the grandson claims this is the best.

key_events_verified_phase5: 猪野が来訪瑞獣の獬豸と霊亀を使用する
オガミ婆が降霊術を準備する
虎杖と伏黒があべこべの性質を探る
verification_notes_phase5: 集英社公式10・11巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第五段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
